title: amauropelta grantii
intro: Amauropelta grantii is a species of fern in the family Dryopteridaceae, native to New Zealand. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional Maori medicine, where it is used to treat various ailments. Amauropelta grantii is believed to have anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which may help to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and promote wound healing, offering potential health benefits such as improved immune function and reduced risk of infection. In herbal preparations, Amauropelta grantii is often used in the form of teas, infusions, or tinctures, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety for human use.
